heraldEmpty: No channels yet. Create your first Herald.
heraldDeleteConfirm: Delete Herald «{{name}}»? All associated Tiding rules will be deleted in cascade.
heraldFieldNameHint: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only, up to 63 characters
heraldTypeCatalogError: Failed to load the channel type catalog. Try closing and reopening the form.
heraldFieldKindMapHint: Key: value pairs, one per line
heraldFieldKindVaultRefHint: Format vault:<mount>/<path>. The secret is resolved from Vault at delivery time.
heraldFieldHeadersHint: Key: value pairs, one per line (e.g. Authorization: Bearer …)
heraldFieldSecretRefHint: Format vault:<mount>/<path>. When set, webhook is signed with X-SoulStack-Signature: sha256=…
heraldFieldSecretValueHint: Secret string for signing. Keeper stores it in Vault for you; the value is not shown after saving. Requires a TLS-fronted Operator API.
heraldSecretConfigValueHint: Secret value. Keeper stores it in Vault for you; the value is not shown after saving. Requires a TLS-fronted Operator API.
heraldFieldHttpAllowedWarn: Warning: disables TLS verification. Data will be transmitted in plain text.
heraldFieldAllowPrivateWarn: Warning: disables SSRF protection for private ranges (RFC 1918). Use only in trusted networks.
tidingEmpty: No rules yet. Create your first Tiding.
tidingFieldNameHint: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only, up to 63 characters
tidingFieldEventTypesHint: Select from known areas or enter a custom event type
tidingFieldTaskHint: Notify when a specific task (by its id or register name) produced changes in a run. Works together with the incarnation.run_completed event.
tidingFieldAnnotationsHint: Static fields merged into the webhook body. Format: key = value.
tidingFieldProjectionHint: List of event payload paths to include (empty = all). Example: summary.succeeded, voyage_id
